subject: Add more STAGING tags
commit_message:
Add more STAGING tags

 - initial implementation tagged the verified images only with
   <full version>-STAGING-latest while the original maven tagging
   added also <minor version>-STAGING-latest and
   <full version>-STAGING-<timestamp>; the latter two are now added
   by the script as well

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3019
Signed-off-by: Lasse Kaihlavirta <l.kaihlavirt@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ieb06a596e01f04b45295e7c2179ba8a0088f4af6

Patch Set 1:

Currently verify job is not executing docker-maven-plugin build goal, and without same verify job is not doing it's intended task.

Lasse, in verify job you should have docker-maven-plugin build goal added but skip pushing same.

For reference: 
1) https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ci-management.git;a=blob;f=jjb/ccsdk/cds.yaml;hb=HEAD#l7
2) https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ccsdk/cds/+/112756
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 1:

Another thing, I just realised that review-verification is triggering another docker-snapshot job, which basically generate image as well as push, few docker images with STAGING tag and few with SNAPSHOT tag.

so I have few questions:
1) Why two different tags are being created i.e SNAPSHOT, STAGING
2) Verify should only generate image, not push
3) Was docker-snapshot job just created to verify if in real docker images are being created or not?

Meanwhile, I have two reviews open, where I refactored docker-maven-plugin mainly to have only one execution which does both build and push, with an additional param 'docker.skip.push' which if true then execution will only generate image and skip pushing to nexus.

Reviews:
1) https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ci-management/+/116470
2) https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ccsdk/distribution/+/116467
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Currently verify job is not executing docker-maven-plugin build goal, and without same verify job is not doing it's intended task.

What intended task and *which exact job* are you referring to?

> Lasse, in verify job you should have docker-maven-plugin build goal added but skip pushing same.
> 
> For reference: 
> 1) https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=ci-management.git;a=blob;f=jjb/ccsdk/cds.yaml;hb=HEAD#l7
> 2) https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/ccsdk/cds/+/112756

I looked through those reviews but didn't quite understand what you meant?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Another thing, I just realised that review-verification is triggering another docker-snapshot job, which basically generate image as well as push, few docker images with STAGING tag and few with SNAPSHOT tag.
> so I have few questions:
> 1) Why two different tags are being created i.e SNAPSHOT, STAGING

This is because the versioning and tagging redesign has not yet been thoroughly taken in use in ccsdk/distribution. For now I have only applied it to the two images (dgbuilder and odlsli-alpine) that are being tested by CSIT and left the others untouched - but ultimately this should be applied with all the other images as well (however, I'd like to clarify a few things there before finalizing that).

> 2) Verify should only generate image, not push

How do you propose the CSIT tests to get the generated SNAPSHOT images if not via Nexus?

> 3) Was docker-snapshot job just created to verify if in real docker images are being created or not?

No, it was added to create uniquely tagged SNAPSHOT images that CSIT tests can use in the next step.

> Meanwhile, I have two reviews open, where I refactored docker-maven-plugin mainly to have only one execution which does both build and push, with an additional param 'docker.skip.push' which if true then execution will only generate image and skip pushing to nexus.

I'll take a look at those, but if they have been created just for the purpose of being able to run these review-verification docker builds without pushing, they run against the current design.
